# Patti Smith Real Estate, Cool, California

> Georgetown Divide real estate broker serving Cool and the western El Dorado County foothills. Specialist in rural, canyon-edge, and equestrian property, the gated Auburn Lake Trails community, acreage, wells, septic, water rights, fire hazard zones, and Gold Country homes.

## About
- Broker: Patti Smith (Patti Smith Real Estate, Independent)
- License: CA DRE #01110483
- Office: 6180 State Highway 193, Georgetown, CA 95634
- Phone: (530) 368-0852
- Serving the Sierra Nevada foothills since 1992
- Georgetown Divide resident; past president of the Georgetown Rotary Club; 12-year director of the Georgetown Fire Department

## Cool, CA at a glance
- Unincorporated community in El Dorado County at the junction of Highways 49 and 193, formerly named Cave Valley, renamed for Aaron Cool; elevation about 1,532 feet
- About 5 miles from the confluence of the North and South Forks of the American River; gateway to the Auburn State Recreation Area; ZIP 95614
- Two markets: standalone rural acreage, and the gated Auburn Lake Trails community (about 23 miles of horse trails, an equestrian center, and shared amenities)
- On the Western States Trail, route of the Tevis Cup and the Western States 100 endurance run; home of the Way Too Cool 50K each March
- Largely within high fire hazard severity zones; warm-summer Mediterranean climate
- Water: Georgetown Divide Public Utility District and community systems, plus private wells and septic on rural parcels
- Schools: Black Oak Mine Unified School District; Northside STEAM School (TK-6) in Cool; Golden Sierra Junior Senior High (grades 7-12) in Garden Valley
- Typical market: move-ready homes roughly $400,000 to $700,000; Divide-area median near $439,000; raw land from about $50,000; equestrian estates $1,000,000 to $2,000,000
